docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLDWELL BANKER REALTY $75.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEFF GILLETT (SALES MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT COLDWELL BANKER REALTY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY TURNER, GREGORY COLDWELL BANKER REALTY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AARON GRUBER. PLAINTIFF GREGORY TRUNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COLDWELL BANKER REALTY IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS JEFF GILLETT AND DANIEL MCGRU. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: AARON GRUBER; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
